title: George Town、Penang — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: George Town、Penang的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

George Town是Penang的一个城市，人口约794,000。Penang’s UNESCO-listed capital, famous for its street art, colonial architecture, and world-renowned street food.
